_doc: Raven Hollow NEW-GAME flow orchestrator config (BACKLOG #84 -> #43). Optional/degradable: NewGameSystem runs fine if this file is missing. Ties the D2 class SELECT SCREEN (SelectScreenSystem) to the starting-zone onboarding checklist (TrainerSystem #43) and the first spawn. 'default_class' is used when no class is chosen (e.g. select screen absent). 'start_zone_by_class' maps a chosen class to the zone it wakes up in; every class starts in Raven Hollow per STARTING_ZONES sec 0/1, so this mirrors data/starting_flow.json. 'fallback_zone' is the last resort.
